summary: Vendor Transactions Feature Testing Complete. All new vendor portal features working: GET /api/vendor/transactions returns all transaction statuses (not just pending), filtering by status/type/date works correctly, Excel/PDF export endpoints return valid files, non-vendor users blocked (403). Frontend filter bar and export buttons verified.

tests: Unauthenticated blocked from all vendor endpoints (401)
Status dropdown with All Status, Pending, Approved, Rejected, Completed options
Type dropdown with All Types, Deposit, Withdrawal options
Clear Filters button appears when filter is active
Export Excel button visible with download icon
Export PDF button visible with file icon
Transaction count shown ('0 transactions') next to 'Assigned Transactions' header

critical_code_review_comments: Good: Vendor endpoint correctly returns all transaction statuses, not just pending
Good: All filter parameters work correctly (status, transaction_type, date_from, date_to)
Good: Export endpoints return valid XLSX and PDF files with proper content types
Good: Access control works - non-vendor users get 403, unauthenticated get 401
Good: Frontend filter bar has all required elements with proper data-testid attributes
Good: Clear Filters button appears only when filters are active
Note: Vendor currently has 0 transactions (expected per agent context)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - vendor has 0 transactions (expected per context)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor transactions feature complete. Backend endpoints: GET /api/vendor/transactions (with filters: status, transaction_type, date_from, date_to), GET /api/vendor/transactions/export/excel, GET /api/vendor/transactions/export/pdf. All require vendor role (require_vendor dependency). Frontend: VendorDashboard.js has filter bar with data-testid attributes (tx-search-input, tx-status-filter, tx-type-filter, tx-date-from, tx-date-to, tx-clear-filters, tx-export-excel, tx-export-pdf). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_vendor_transactions.py
